required_preferences.fact: Delegates all on-location photography—including camera operation, gear adjustments, and composition—to trusted assistants or postpones shoots entirely, as she cannot physically operate camera equipment with her wrist in a cast

supersedes.fact: Delegates on-location camera setup, breakdown, and heavy gear transport to local assistants or fixers during assignments, never carries or lifts equipment herself due to medical restriction

required_preferences.fact: Backs up photo files nightly using cloud storage and rented hardware, as her usual drives and backup gear are unavailable due to equipment theft

supersedes.fact: Backs up photo files nightly to two separate drives — never relies solely on cloud storage

required_preferences.fact: Incorporates daily physiotherapist-recommended stretches and core stabilization exercises in place of previous swimming or gym routines
Shares updates about her gear loss and adaptation process on Instagram stories, prioritizing transparency with followers during assignments
Posts Instagram stories at sunset local time during assignments, never posts in real-time throughout the day
Keeps Sundays flexible for spontaneous family gatherings with her parents, declining nonessential work or social invitations on those afternoons

persona: A solo freelance photographer who travels internationally for assignments
